subtitle.zh: 上海科技大学 · 计算机科学与技术 · 本科

quotes: All for one, one for all.
I am young, I am strong, I am rich, and I am happy.
Reading is an adventure of the mind.
The merit of all things lies in their difficulty.
Nothing makes time pass like a thought that absorbs all your mind.
Never fear quarrels, but seek hazardous adventures.
You’re young. Your bitter memories still have time to turn to sweet ones
Nothing makes the future look so bright as surveying it through a glass of chambertin.
The best way to keep one’s word is not to give it.
Life is a chaplet of little miseries which the philosopher counts with a smile.

intro.zh: 上海科技大学 2025 级计算机科学与技术专业本科生。理性的代码世界之外，我也沉醉于文字的魅力——热爱阅读，具备排版与校对经验，并在校内校外积累了多元的工作经历。我相信技术与人文的交叉点，往往藏着最有趣的可能。
intro.en: An undergraduate student (Class of 2029) in Computer Science and Technology at ShanghaiTech. Beyond the world of code, I'm drawn to the power of words—an avid reader with experience in editing and proofreading. I've also gained diverse work experience both on and off campus. I believe the most exciting possibilities lie at the intersection of technology and the humanities.

title.zh: 基于Arduino UNO及传感器卡的智能门锁
title.en: Smart Lock Project Based on Arduino UNO

detail.zh:
信息科学与技术导论课程期末小组作业，主要负责实验数据的记录（照片与视频）和整理，并撰写最后的项目报告。
 基于Arduino UNO及传感器卡实现智能门锁，设计了Home和Guest两个页面：前者直接进入密码输入页面，通过密码开关锁；后者向客户端（点灯APP）发送信息，由客户端决定是否远程开锁。同时利用红蓝LED灯和无源蜂鸣器设计了防御措施，连续三次输错密码后触发蜂鸣器报警和红蓝LED交替警示。
detail.en:
Final group project for Introduction to Information Science and Technology. Mainly responsible for data recording (photos & videos) and report writing. 
 Implemented a smart door lock using Arduino UNO and sensor cards by designing two interfaces: 'Home' (direct password entry for locking/unlocking) and 'Guest' (sends a request to the client via the app 'blinker' for remote unlocking decision). Additionally, implemented a defense mechanism using red/blue LEDs and a passive buzzer.

star.zh: 具备硬件项目的协作开发能力，有实验数据整理与技术文档撰写经验，能够清晰记录项目全流程并输出高质量报告。
star.en: Possess collaborative development skills for hardware projects, have experience in experimental data organization and technical documentation, capable of clearly recording the entire project lifecycle and producing high-quality reports.

title.en: Development of the Game I, Zombie (C++)

detail.zh:
计算机编程课程个人期末作业。
 在给定基础代码框架上，使用C++实现游戏核心玩法，包括放置僵尸及其技能与行为表现、放置植物及其攻击与被击杀表现、完整游戏逻辑判断，以及游戏数据的监视与更新。
detail.en:
Final individual project for the Computer Programming course.
  Built upon a given code framework, implemented the core gameplay of I, Zombie using C++, including zombie placement with distinct skills and behaviors, plant placement with attack and death animations, complete game logic judgment and real-time monitoring & updating of game data.

star.zh: 具备独立完成中小型C++项目的能力，熟悉面向对象编程逻辑，具备管理大量代码、调试与解决问题的能力，初步理解游戏设计架构。
star.en: Capable of independently completing small-to-medium-scale C++ projects, familiar with object-oriented programming logic, experienced in managing large codebases, debugging and problem-solving, with a preliminary understanding of game design architecture.

detail.zh: 在AI agent协助下完成个人简历网站搭建，并使用GitHub Desktop实现网址部署与网页更新。
detail.en: Built a personal portfolio website with the assistance of AI agents, and deployed it with continuous updates using GitHub Desktop.

star.zh: 具备快速学习与工具运用能力，能够利用AI工具提升开发效率，并掌握基础的版本控制与网站部署流程。
star.en: Possess fast-learning and tool-application abilities, capable of leveraging AI tools to improve development efficiency, with foundational knowledge of version control and website deployment processes.

quote.en: "Reading is an adventure of the mind."

description.zh: 爱好折纸，熟悉各类立体、手工折纸造型。长期折纸培养了我的细心、专注力与动手能力。
description.en: Love origami, familiar with various 3D and handmade paper folding models. Long-term origami practice has cultivated my carefulness, focus, and hands-on ability.

description.zh: 喜欢骑行和游泳，尽管两个都不精通。
description.en: Enjoy cycling and swimming, though not proficient at either.

description.zh: 我偏爱经典文学，最喜欢的小说是《三个火枪手》，非常喜欢大仲马笔下的友谊。我还喜欢写小说（二次创作），也在公众号上发表过文章。
description.en: I prefer classic literature, with 'The Three Musketeers' being my favorite novel. I greatly admire the friendship depicted in Dumas' works. I also enjoy writing fiction (fanfiction) and have published articles on WeChat public account.

description.zh: 喜欢看科幻向的电视剧，如《神秘博士》。
description.en: Enjoy watching sci-fi TV series, such as 'Doctor Who'.
